authority_order.meaning: Tree of Sophia home surface, source-home manifest, and top-level home route cards
golden Zarathustra orientation route for the project's current living entry
reviewed authored nodes, relation packs, and registries
current ToS knowledge law, node contracts, templates, and interpretation discipline
public structural contracts for ToS-owned surfaces
branch-shaped philosophy topology and local graph workbench routes
non-authoritative research scaffolds for later review
dated inspection notes and review evidence for corpus growth
generated downstream read models subordinate to ToS authority
runtime access, visualization, MCP, UI, and projection stores only

branches.role: ToS knowledge law, node contracts, templates, interpretation ladder, and route doctrine that belongs to authored meaning.
Primary source-facing witness material and provenance-aware source files.
Golden Zarathustra route branch for the current bounded prologue entry, public-entry capsule, and ToS axis orientation.
Non-authoritative AI-assisted or secondary research scaffolds that may feed philosophy branch review but never source, doctrine, canon, or graph authority.
Domain-shaped growing philosophy tree: trunk law, era branches, tradition subtrees, local graph workbenches, and cross-thread navigation.
Provisional extraction, tabular base material, and promotion ledgers.
Canonical authored nodes, relation packs, and vocabulary registries.
ToS-owned public-safe compatibility mirrors, examples, and tiny-entry compatibility surfaces.
ToS-owned generated downstream-facing exports and compact read models.
ToS-owned public schema contracts for ToS surfaces.
Dated inspection notes and review evidence.

graph_views.purpose: show the whole ToS home as a branch-shaped tree
switch corpus visibility by witness, research, candidate, canon, compatibility, and export layers
inspect a concrete relation pack without losing its owner branch and provenance
expand around one node by bounded hops over the full corpus substrate
trace source witness or research packet pressure into candidate, canon, and export surfaces
review candidate-intake material against canon promotion status
compare two corpus index snapshots for review

allowed: serve MCP resources and tools that point back to ToS
build runtime graph projections, UI views, and Neo4j caches
emit review diagnostics without changing ToS authority
not_allowed: move canonical ToS meaning into abyss-stack
treat Neo4j, MCP, UI, or runtime cache as source truth
write ToS canon without ToS validators and explicit operator route
